description: Use this API to modify the data of an existing substation switching device in the working case, or to add a new substation switching device to the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = station_swd_data(station, inode, jnode, cktarg, intgar, realar, namear)
python_syntax: ierr = station_swd_data(station, inode, jnode, cktarg, intgar, realar, namear)

error_codes.description: circuit identifier is more than two characters.
switching device from node to itself.
cannot place substation switching device between nodes residing in different substations.
cannot place substation switching device between nodes belonging to two different buses in the same substation.
station switching device table is full.
system switching device table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - switching device reactance is 0.0. - switching device rating is less than 0.0. - invalid status. - switching device name truncated to 40 characters. - switching device name contains invalid characters. - switching device name already assigned to another switching device in substation.
